decisions_made: Enforce artifact schema creation (RULE-004) as first actionable task (T1).
Separate test & build validation as T5 to ensure machine-checkable CLI outputs are captured per RULE-002.

execution_blockers.blocker: Potential repo path ambiguity with embedded '~'
execution_blockers.resolution: Task T1 must record this and request exact path resolution; block T3/T5 until resolved if it prevents locating files.
Proceed using local agent-context lessons and repo file patterns; re-run librarian queries when OV fixed.
